meta.name: robots

body.style: background-color: #f8f9fa; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; font-family: sans-serif; direction: rtl;

div.style: border: 4px solid #f3f3f3; border-top: 4px solid #3498db; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; animation: spin 2s linear infinite; margin: 0 auto 20px;
